name: Using Examples
description: Learn how the live code examples work - preview, source, copy, and Playground.

steps.title: Live Examples
steps.task: Every page ships a runnable example - not a screenshot.

steps.title: It's Live
steps.task: This is the real component running. Click the tabs - it responds.

steps.title: Real Source
steps.task: Below the preview is the exact code that produces it. Larger examples span multiple files - tabs let you read each.
steps.learn: Read the source behind an example

steps.title: Copy It
steps.task: Grab the whole file with one click.

steps.title: Play With It
steps.task: Open it live in the Playground to edit and experiment - no setup.
steps.learn: Open an example in the Playground

steps.title: Tune the View
steps.task: Resize the preview, bump the code size, wrap long lines.
steps.learn: Adjust code size and line wrap

steps.title: That's Examples
steps.task: Every page works this way - read it, copy it, play with it.
steps.learn: Use examples like a power user
